meta.title: ProcureLink - Restaurant Supply Management
meta.description: Connect restaurants with suppliers. Browse products, place orders, and schedule deliveries - all in one place.

onboarding.title: Set up your company
onboarding.privacyNote: By submitting you accept our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
onboarding.setupBlurb: Takes about a minute. You can edit any of this later from your settings.
onboarding.descBasicsSupplier: Tell us about your business - the basics first.
onboarding.descBasicsRestaurant: Tell us about your restaurant - the basics first.
onboarding.currencyHelp: All your prices and orders will use this currency. You can change it later.
onboarding.cuisineHelp: Helps us suggest the right suppliers for your menu.
onboarding.emailHelp: We'll send order notifications and receipts here.
onboarding.dataPrivate: Your data stays private. We never share business details with third parties.
onboarding.skipNote: You can skip optional fields and add them later from your settings.

landing.heroBadge: Private beta - first cohort now open
landing.heroSubtitle: One place for every supplier. Browse catalogs, order from multiple suppliers in a single checkout, and automate what repeats. Built for kitchens tired of phone calls and spreadsheets.
landing.problemP1: Most kitchens work with 6 to 12 suppliers. Each one wants orders in its own format - Viber, email, PDF, a phone call before 9 pm.
landing.problemP2: Mistakes hide in that chaos. A missed Tuesday. A double charge nobody catches until invoice day. A delivery slot the supplier never confirmed.
landing.problemP3: ProcureLink replaces the chaos with one workflow both sides can see.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Not just a listing tool. Not a plain order form. The full loop from discovery to delivery to reorder.
landing.featureCartDesc: Add products from any supplier in your network. One checkout - we split it into the right orders behind the scenes.
landing.featureRecurringDesc: Salmon every Tuesday, spices every Thursday. Set it up once and orders go out on schedule by themselves.
landing.featureCalendarDesc: A monthly calendar of every incoming delivery. Your kitchen knows what arrives and when, at a glance.
landing.featureSlotsDesc: Every supplier publishes delivery slots. The app blocks dates they can't fulfil - no more orders that silently never arrive.
landing.featureAuditDesc: Every status change, payment, and cancellation - timestamped and visible to both sides. No more 'who said what'.
landing.featureCurrencyDesc: Prices in dinars or euros - each order follows the currency of the supplier you buy from.
landing.howTitle: From sign-up to your first order in
landing.step1Desc: Products from every connected supplier in one place. Filter by category. Compare prices side by side.
landing.step2Desc: Add everything to one cart - even from five suppliers. Pick a delivery date. Confirm. We split the orders.
landing.step3Desc: Follow every order through its statuses: pending, confirmed, dispatched, delivered. Flag issues the moment they appear.
landing.step4Desc: Turn any cart into a recurring order. Weekly, biweekly, monthly. Edit or pause anytime.
landing.restaurantsBody: Browse products from every supplier you work with. Compare at a glance. Order from five at once and pick a delivery day for each. Set salmon, bread, and dairy to repeat on the right schedule and stop thinking about them.
landing.restaurantsBullet1: Catalogs from every supplier in your network
landing.restaurantsBullet2: One cart across suppliers, one checkout
landing.restaurantsBullet3: Recurring orders daily, weekly, or monthly
landing.restaurantsBullet4: A delivery calendar showing every incoming order
landing.restaurantsCta: Join the beta as a restaurant
landing.suppliersBody: List your products. Set delivery slots by zone and day. Restaurants find you, place orders, and you move them from pending to delivered in a single view. Regulars reorder on a schedule you never have to chase.
landing.suppliersBullet3: Delivery slots by zone, day, and capacity
landing.suppliersBullet4: Payment status tracking with a full audit trail
landing.suppliersCta: Join the beta as a supplier
landing.betaSubtitle: We won't pretend to be bigger than we are. Here's the honest offer for pilot members.
landing.pilotFounderTitle: A direct line to the founder
landing.pilotFounderDesc: We answer your messages the same day. The team is small and you talk to us directly.
landing.pilotRoadmapDesc: The features we build next are the ones pilot members ask for. You don't queue behind bigger clients.
landing.pilotPriceDesc: Whatever we charge after the beta, pilot members get 50% off forever. No surprises on the invoice.
landing.founderMessage: We're building this with a small group because the only way to get procurement right is to sit next to the people who do it every day. If you join the beta, expect emails, calls, and the occasional "would this be useful?" before we ship anything.
landing.founderMessage2: In return, you get a product shaped around your kitchen - not someone else's idea of one.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Restaurants order free, forever. Suppliers pay a simple monthly software fee. Pilot members lock in 50% off forever.
landing.pricingBetaNote: Everything is free during the beta. The prices below are indicative and apply after launch.
landing.pricingRestaurantsDesc: Order from all your suppliers, schedule deliveries, automate recurring orders. Always free.
landing.tierBasicTagline: For suppliers just starting to take orders.
landing.tierProTagline: For suppliers with serious order volume.
landing.pricingFootnote: We charge a software fee only - no per-transaction commission. Interested suppliers reach out and we activate them manually during the beta.
landing.finalTitle: Ready to run procurement as a workflow?
landing.finalSubtitle: Five minutes to set up. Free while the beta lasts. A real product, a real founder, a real conversation.
landing.footerTagline: Restaurant procurement without the phone calls. Currently in private beta.
